agent cli

terminal-first multi-agent cockpit — real Claude TUI front and center, thin file rail, tabs = projects · 8 slices · 3 shipped

Tab = project. Panes = agents, each in its own worktree. Real TUI everywhere. Ship config before code — build the Tauri app only against frictions the trials prove.

TrialsCockpit configBuild (endgame)Research🔒 launch blocker⊘ gated

Now

Rocks · foundational & risky

SR0 · Editor-fidelity spikeTrials
v0🔒

1-2h, not a week: open a real file in helix at real terminal font next to the VSCode screenshot. Tools installed (zellij/yazi/helix via brew, Ghostty already present); spike/ has the file and instructions. Resolves the riskiest unknown before either trial starts — added after the blind-spot audit found this was riding undecided inside a 7-day trial.

Done criteria

Verdict logged in DECISIONS.md: does a TUI editor satisfy 'I expected it to look like VSCode's,' per the threshold already written there.

gates R1
LR1 · Zellij cockpit trialTrials
v0🔒

KDL layout in Ghostty: tabs per project (indx, brutal, prova, gripe), yazi file rail, claude/codex panes each in their own worktree. Zellij persistence — no tmux wrapper. Runs only after R0 passes.

Done criteria

One week of daily use across 2+ projects with 3+ agent panes; every friction logged in ERRORS.md same-day, not from memory.

decides R3 — threshold in DECISIONS.md

Next

Rocks · foundational & risky

MR2 · Superconductor daily-driver trialTrials
v0🔒

Already installed (super.engineering). Its workspace-tabs + worktree-per-task model is exactly the ask; its chat UI instead of the claude TUI is the open question. Closed source, v0.1.0 nightly. Runs after R1 concludes, not concurrently — parallel trials would confound friction attribution with tool-switching cost.

Done criteria

Clear keep/kill verdict after a full real week: does losing the terminal CLI view actually hurt?

decides R3 — threshold in DECISIONS.md
MP1 · Ship v0 cockpit configCockpit config
v0🔒

Winner of the trials becomes the shipped artifact: zellij KDL layout(s) + install script + README in this repo. Zero application code.

Done criteria

Fresh shell: one command → cockpit with 4 project tabs, agents running, surviving a restart.

Pebbles · features

SP2 · Worktree helperCockpit config
v1

One keystroke: new agent pane = git worktree add + claude launched inside it, named and disposable. The 'same repo, parallel tasks' half of the mixed workflow.

Done criteria

From any project tab: new-worktree-agent in <5s; cleanup command removes worktree + branch.

Later

Rocks · foundational & risky

XLR3 · Tauri 2 native harnessBuild (endgame)
v2⊘

The endgame, only if trials hit the named threshold in DECISIONS.md (2026-07-07 entry) — not a vibe call after the fact. Seed from hashmark's Tauri scaffold + Warp design spec (color algebra, fonts, 358 icons); new core = portable-pty → xterm.js; workspace tabs + worktree-per-task model stolen from Superconductor.

Done criteria

v0 scope written from the trials' logged frictions — not imagined features — before any code.

closes the gap no OSS app fills (native-light, real PTY, thin rail)

Pebbles · features

SP3 · Zed stripped fallback configCockpit config
v2⊘

Verified settings.json/keymap/tasks for Zed as window-per-project cockpit (no project tabs exist in Zed — top community request). Kept as documented fallback, not the main path.

Done criteria

Config documented in docs/; applied in <1h if ever wanted.

Sand · glue & polish

SS2 · Mine Superconductor bundle for UX patternsResearch
v2⊘

Settings-key notes + screenshot (kept in resources/ — the actual binary was removed from git, see DECISIONS.md 2026-07-07: you can't mine UX patterns from a compiled binary, so committing it had no benefit). Only runs if R3 actually fires, not scheduled by default — was previously a guaranteed step regardless of trial outcome.

✅ Shipped (3)
MS0 · Research: OSS landscape + Zed verificationResearch
v0

July 2026 survey: every purpose-built Claude Code GUI reimplements the UI, is deprecated, closed, or Electron-heavy. Zed: no project tabs, terminals die on quit, git panel single-repo. Zellij+yazi delivers ~90% of the spec at zero build cost.

Done criteria

Findings drove the trial-first roadmap; rejected options documented with reasons. ✓ 2026-07-07

SS1 · Repo + roadmap board + interactive cockpit demoCockpit config
v0

Private repo with rockmap vendored, this board, and an interactive HTML demo of the zellij cockpit experience. Note: the demo shipped before any real trial hours were logged — flagged in the 2026-07-07 blind-spot audit as the project's central risk; see ERRORS.md.

Done criteria

Pushed to github.com/jpoindexter/agent-cli (private). ✓ 2026-07-07

MS3 · Audit remediationTrials
v0

Scaffolded PRD/ROADMAP/DECISIONS/PARKED/ERRORS. Installed zellij, yazi, helix (Ghostty already present) and built the editor-fidelity spike (spike/). Sequenced R1/R2, named the R3 threshold, re-gated S2. Removed the 117MB Superconductor binary from git (kept 548K of notes/icon). Pruned an orphaned worktree in indx; flagged its branch ambiguity for Jason instead of guessing.

Done criteria

All 16 audit findings addressed or explicitly deferred with a named owner (Jason, for the one judgment call). ✓ 2026-07-07
